title: Villagers Reborn
description: Replaces villagers and illagers with custom human models while keeping vanilla features. Inspired by the amazing work done in Minecraft Comes Alive (MCA).
body:
# **Villagers Reborn** You can find the [**wiki**](https://www.patreon.com/posts/villagers-reborn-159604973) and see all the changes in the new **Marriage & Family Update** [**here 📝**](https://www.patreon.com/posts/villagers-reborn-159604973) And if you'd like to support the project, you can grab me a [**Ko-fi ☕**](https://ko-fi.com/javieljefe) [![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/83QcmPt.png)](https://www.patreon.com/posts/villagers-reborn-159604973) **Villagers Reborn** replaces vanilla villagers with human models while keeping their usual jobs, trades, and behavior. You can build relationships with villagers, start dating, get married, and start a family! Also includes villager names, personalities, custom equipment, and a dialogue system. Works in any existing world and is compatible with most mods that add custom trades or professions. It also replaces other mobs such as illagers, witches, and the wandering trader with human models. ---

Mod Collection ⚔️

   

---

Dialogue Screen

![Dialogue Screen](https://i.imgur.com/47Jhomv.png) ### New features 📌
- Custom villager human models - Family system - Dating and marriage system - New villager sounds - New illagers models and sounds - New wandering merchant models and sounds - New witches models - Functional vanilla trades - Compatible with modded trades - Villager personality system - Villager dialogue system (press **R** to talk) - Villager inventory and equipment - Villager orders (follow, stay, set home) - Villager management - Receive gifts from villagers based on relationship level (**[**item pool**](https://www.patreon.com/posts/villager-gifts-157952349)**) - Resurrect villagers - Works with modded villages and towns - Villagers have their own name tags - Villagers keep their original vanilla behavior - Compatible with existing worlds - New villager spawn eggs - Villager models support any skin ([**change skin tutorial**](https://www.patreon.com/posts/how-to-change-157545429)) - Skin selection screen (modern or medieval)

Start a Family

![Family](https://i.imgur.com/puuT3VM.png)
Gallery 📸


To do list 🛠️ - Add villager guards / police - Add kings and queens - Expand dialogue and relationship options - Update the dialogue GUI - Add marriage system ✔️ - Village management - Character creation - Receive gifts from villagers ✔️ - Quests system - Add villager orders: follow, stay, equip, and set home ✔️ - Add an in-game option to change any villager’s skin ✔️ - Add advancements - Items rework - Custom model for the wandering trader ✔️ - Custom models for zombie villagers ✔️ - Add config options and key binds to adjust settings in-game ✔️ - Improve general villager behavior - Use villager custom models for players? - Add human versions of pillagers and witches ✔️ - Full multiplayer and LAN compatibility ✔️ - Fabric compatibility - Forge 1.20.1

Translations 📄 - Russian by **Max Snegir**

Issues ⚠️ - If you get stuck on the birth screen you can use the keyboard arrows to select Confirm or adjust the GUI scale - Sometimes a villager gender changes after curing them from zombification if you cure more than one villager at the same time - Already existing villagers disappear if the mod is removed

Here you can report bugs or [**issues**](https://github.com/Javieljefe/Villagers-Reborn/issues) and leave a [**comment**](https://www.patreon.com/collection/2146365?view=expanded). [![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/lAACYoM.png)](https://www.patreon.com/posts/villagers-reborn-159604973) This mod includes skins from **[Skindex](https://www.minecraftskins.com/)**. All rights belong to their original creators, who were contacted when possible with permissions confirmed where available. You can find the talented authors in the **[Skin Credits](https://github.com/Javieljefe/Villagers-Reborn/blob/main/SKIN_CREDITS.md)**. **This mod is now fully compatible with single player, local multiplayer (LAN), and multiplayer/dedicated servers.**
